sentences.target: J'ai une faiblesse pour le chocolat.

translations.fr: J'ai une faiblesse pour le chocolat.
translations.en: I have a weakness for chocolate.
translations.de: Ich habe eine Schwäche für Schokolade.
translations.it: Ho un debole per il cioccolato.
translations.zh-Hans: 我对巧克力没有抵抗力。
translations.vi: Tôi có điểm yếu với sô-cô-la.
translations.nl: Ik heb een zwak voor chocolade.
translations.nb: Jeg har en svakhet for sjokolade.
translations.sv: Jag har en svaghet för choklad.
translations.da: Jeg har en svaghed for chokolade.
translations.ja: 私はチョコレートに目がない。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun, 1st person singular, elided before a vowel; marks the grammatical subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses possession of the direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiners the noun 'faiblesse'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'ai'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional complement indicating target/preference ('pour le chocolat').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiners the noun 'chocolat'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Tu connais sa faiblesse depuis longtemps.

translations.fr: Tu connais sa faiblesse depuis longtemps.
translations.en: You’ve known their weakness for a long time.
translations.es: Conoces su debilidad desde hace mucho.
translations.de: Du kennst seine Schwäche schon lange.
translations.it: Conosci la sua debolezza da tanto tempo.
translations.ko: 너는 그 사람의 약점을 오래전부터 알고 있었어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你早就知道他的弱点了。
translations.pt: Você conhece a fraqueza dele há muito tempo.
translations.he: אתה מכיר את החולשה שלו כבר הרבה זמן.
translations.vi: Bạn biết điểm yếu của người đó từ lâu rồi.
translations.ar: أنت تعرف ضعفه منذ وقت طويل.
translations.nl: Je kent zijn zwakke plek al heel lang.
translations.hi: तुम उसकी कमजोरी काफ़ी समय से जानते हो.
translations.el: Ξέρεις την αδυναμία του εδώ και πολύ καιρό.
translations.nb: Du har kjent svakheten hans lenge.
translations.sv: Du har vetat om hans svaghet länge.
translations.ro: Îi cunoști slăbiciunea de mult timp.
translations.da: Du har kendt hans svaghed i lang tid.
translations.fi: Olet tiennyt hänen heikkoutensa jo pitkään.
translations.ja: あなたは彼の弱点をずっと前から知っている。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; grammatical subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a direct object.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person; agrees in gender/number with 'faiblesse' (feminine singular).
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'connais'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement; heads the PP 'depuis longtemps'.
Adverb of duration; complement to 'depuis' giving the length of time.

sentences.target: Sa faiblesse est le café du matin.
sentences.reading: /sa fɛblɛs ɛ lə kafe dy matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Sa faiblesse est le café du matin.
translations.ipa: /sa fɛblɛs ɛ lə kafe dy matɛ̃/
translations.es: Su debilidad es el café de la mañana.
translations.it: La sua debolezza è il caffè del mattino.
translations.zh-Hans: 他的弱点是早晨的咖啡。
translations.yue: 佢嘅弱點係朝早嘅咖啡。
translations.pt: A fraqueza dele é o café matinal.
translations.he: החולשה שלו היא קפה של הבוקר.
translations.vi: Điểm yếu của người đó là cà phê buổi sáng.
translations.hi: उसकी कमजोरी सुबह की कॉफी है.
translations.el: Η αδυναμία του είναι ο πρωινός καφές.
translations.ro: Slăbiciunea lui este cafeaua de dimineață.
translations.ja: 彼の弱点は朝のコーヒーです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 3rd person; feminine singular agreeing with 'faiblesse'.
Common noun, feminine singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate nominal.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiners 'café'.
Common noun, masculine singular; predicate nominal complement of 'est'.
Contraction of the preposition 'de' and the article 'le'; introduces the nominal modifier 'matin' ('of the morning').
Common noun, masculine singular; object/complement of the contracted preposition 'du', modifying 'café'.

sentences.target: Nous acceptons ta faiblesse sans te juger.
sentences.reading: /nu aksɛptɔ̃ ta fɛblɛs sɑ̃ tə ʒyʒe/

translations.fr: Nous acceptons ta faiblesse sans te juger.
translations.ipa: /nu aksɛptɔ̃ ta fɛblɛs sɑ̃ tə ʒyʒe/
translations.en: We accept your weakness without judging you.
translations.de: Wir akzeptieren deine Schwäche, ohne dich zu verurteilen.
translations.it: Accettiamo la tua debolezza senza giudicarti.
translations.ko: 우리는 너를 판단하지 않고 너의 약점을 받아들인다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们接受你的弱点而不评判你。
translations.yue: 我哋接受你嘅弱點，唔會批判你。
translations.ru: Мы принимаем твою слабость, не осуждая тебя.
translations.pt: Nós aceitamos sua fraqueza sem te julgar.
translations.he: אנחנו מקבלים את החולשה שלך בלי לשפוט אותך.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi chấp nhận điểm yếu của bạn mà không phán xét bạn.
translations.ar: نحن نتقبل ضعفك دون أن نحكم عليك.
translations.nl: We accepteren je zwakte zonder je te veroordelen.
translations.uk: Ми приймаємо твою слабкість, не засуджуючи тебе.
translations.hu: Elfogadjuk a gyengeségedet, és nem ítélünk el.
translations.hi: हम तुम्हारी कमजोरी को बिना जज किए स्वीकार करते हैं.
translations.pl: Akceptujemy twoją słabość, nie osądzając cię.
translations.el: Δεχόμαστε την αδυναμία σου χωρίς να σε κρίνουμε.
translations.nb: Vi aksepterer svakheten din uten å dømme deg.
translations.sv: Vi accepterar din svaghet utan att döma dig.
translations.ro: Îți acceptăm slăbiciunea fără să te judecăm.
translations.cs: Přijímáme tvoji slabost, aniž bychom tě soudili.
translations.da: Vi accepterer din svaghed uden at dømme dig.
translations.fi: Me hyväksymme heikkoutesi ilman että tuomitsemme sinua.
translations.ja: 私たちはあなたの弱さを裁かずに受け入れます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural; grammatical subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; takes a direct object.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; feminine singular agreeing with 'faiblesse'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'acceptons'.
Preposition introducing a negative manner/complement clause ('sans te juger').
Clitic object pronoun, 2nd person singular; direct object of the infinitive 'juger'.
Infinitive verb; complements the preposition 'sans' to form a non-finite clause ('without judging').
